I want to express my sincere appreciation for the entire Henness & Haight team; from the paralegals to my attorneys, David and Jake. My car accident was back in February 2023 and I ended up having to knee surgery. After a long 2 years and 10 months, my case finally closed, and they were with me every step of the way. Communication was clear and consistent throughout the entire process, which was very important to me since I had never filed a lawsuit before.

When it came time for my deposition, David not only throughly explained what a deposition was, but also made sure I was fully prepared with two and a half days of prep. Both David and Jake truly fought to ensure I received the best possible settlement. Where others may have settled, they stood their ground, and as a result, I received a much larger settlement than I ever expected.

While I hope I never get hit again and have to pursue a lawsuit, if I do, I know exactly where I’m going. I would recommend this law firm 100 times over. They genuinely care and will fight for you every step of the way.

Surprising, I KNOW.

By the time we walked out of that meeting, my family felt something we hadn’t in a long time: hope. reviews.text: I would like to give a reason as to why I am giving this place a 1 star review. I contacted this firm to inquire about applying for citizenship. I waited until 5:05pm and nobody called me at all, so I decided to call them directly to find out what had happened and a lady with a very strong accent picked up and all she said was HOW CAN I HELP YOU? reviews.text: As some one who works in credit reporting any company that submits a Cease & Desist on your behalf is going to destroy your credit. They tell you they are going to "help," but they don't. They do not work with the creditors, they "dispute" you credit report and pretend the information they receive in response is insufficient and for you not yo pay. Guess what, that not paying destroys your credit and good luck repairing it. I have seen first hand consumers who had next to immaculate credit have their credit destroyed in just a month or two after joining this firm and many others like them. Do yourself a favor, if you are struggling reach out to your creditor first. Many times they can work with you to save your money, and credit.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your perspective. Because the credit and debt-resolution space is often misunderstood, we believe it is important to be completely transparent about our role and our process.

Our firm is not a credit repair organization. We do not use tactics designed to temporarily inflate a credit score or advise clients to ignore their obligations. Instead, we help consumers exercise their legal rights by requesting verification of the information being reported about them. As we explain clearly in our welcome packet:

“While credit scores matter, they're not the top priority when tackling debt. Instead of obsessing over temporary score fluctuations, we focus on removing inaccurate and invalidated information from your credit report — a right protected by law.”

Any changes that occur after that process are simply the natural result of ensuring a report is accurate and compliant.

Transparency is central to how we operate, and essential to our Better Business Bureau Accreditation and A+ rating. We welcome anyone with questions about our methods or policies to reach out directly so we can provide clarity instead of confusion.

reviews.ownerResponse:
From what you described, it sounds like you canceled your representation before our firm had the opportunity to begin any work on your case. Because of that, your experience appears to relate to the company that initially enrolled you, rather than to any services performed by our firm.
Our role begins only after a client chooses to move forward with representation. Since you canceled prior to that point, we never had the opportunity to review your situation, communicate with creditors, or begin any legal work on your behalf.

We do want to clarify one point you mentioned. It is actually a positive sign when someone is transparent about the fact that outcomes in legal or financial matters cannot be guaranteed. Ethical firms are required to be upfront about that, and we believe honesty about expectations is an important part of responsible representation.

We wish you the best.
Elite

reviews.text:
Title: Misled, mistreated, and now worse off — avoid this firm

I signed up with Elite Legal Practice PC for debt consolidation and paid them consistently for over a year. Then one day, I get aggressive banging on my door — terrifying my entire household — only to find out I’m being sued by one of my creditors. ELP never disclosed that I could still be sued, nor that the money I was paying them wasn’t going toward my actual debt but toward legal fees. What legal work, exactly? Because nothing has been done.

My credit score has plummeted since joining their program. None of my debts have been reduced or managed. This firm has done nothing but take my money and leave me worse off.

After months of trying to reach their managing attorney, Timothy Thomas, he finally promised that the amount I now owe the creditor suing me would be deducted from what I pay ELP. THAT PROMISE WAS BROKEN. They lowered my payment slightly — but not nearly enough. Now I owe more per month overall toward the debt I was sued for — the very debt I thought had been “consolidated” under their program. Meanwhile, the program itself has yielded zero results.

The worst part? The way they treat you. Calling their office is a dehumanizing experience. You’re dismissed, ignored, and spoken to like you don’t matter. Every promise they make is a lie. This firm is a scam, and I regret ever trusting them.
reviews.ownerResponse:
At our law firm, we take all client feedback with the utmost seriousness and are steadfastly committed to upholding the highest standards of ethical and effective legal representation. However, as a law firm, we are bound by strict obligations of client confidentiality and professional conduct, which prevent us from discussing the particulars of any individual matter in a public setting.

That being said, we wish to emphasize that our firm diligently performs all legal services for which we are retained and maintains comprehensive documentation of the work completed on behalf of our clients. We recognize that certain legal matters—particularly those involving debt resolution or complex financial negotiations—can at times take longer than expected and may lead to understandable frustration. Nevertheless, such challenges do not indicate that work has been neglected or that our professional commitments have gone unfulfilled or promises were “broken”.

As a law firm accredited by the Better Business Bureau, our goal is always to support our clients and help them navigate difficult financial situations with transparency and professionalism.

Along the way, Mr. Beckstrom explained in detail how the law in Nevada changed so that the State’s burden of proof in traffic court adheres to a lower standard than it does in criminal court. He helped me understand how the process works when a person fights the system.  He presented a brilliant strategy for my case and prepared me to testify in court. On the day of my trial I was very anxious (as most people would be). He assured me the evidence was on my side and that we would have a favorable outcome. reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Raffi,
We are sorry to hear about your dissatisfaction. When we first met, we explained the issues with your case and assured you we would work to set it on the proper course. Your prior attorney had neglected the case due to health issues, so once we substituted in, we began cleaning up the case and got everything in order.

We discovered that your prior attorney had failed to file an answer to a counter-suit against you. We immediately addressed this by filing an answer on your behalf and got your case exempted from arbitration, preventing a damage cap at $50,000. We made all necessary court filings and complied with all court deadlines.

However, in April, all communication from you ceased. Despite numerous attempts to reach out via phone and letter, we received no response. After over two months without communication, we had no choice but to file a motion to withdraw, as our written contract requires ongoing communication for effective case prosecution. The case is still pending in court, with a trial scheduled for January 2025, so there are no imminent court dates. All discovery requirements and deadlines have been met, giving you ample time to hire a new attorney.

We strive to provide the best service to all our clients, and it is rare for us to withdraw from a case. However, without communication, we don’t have a client to represent. At that point, it is in the best interest of all parties to part ways. Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we hope you find a resolution.

If you wish to discuss your case further and potentially resume representation, please contact us at 702-478-7777. We are here to help.

I asked HR if I could call them back to give a decision (so that I could contact the law firm that was collecting my proof). Someone reccomended that I contact Chris and once I spoke with him I immediately felt confident that he was here to help and would make sure everything got straightened out.

If you're thinking about hiring Chris and have other lawyers in mind forget about it, Chris is your guy.

reviews.text:
I cannot thank this team enough for handling my personal injury lawsuit for a motor vehicle crash. Mr. Connell is tremendous and very attentive to all needs that were involved in the lawsuit, he always was available for any of my questions regarding the process. Once my case was closed out, Mr. Connell so kindly took the extra mile to hand-deliver my compensation from the case to my work, so I did not have to take time out of my day and move my schedule around. I am currently a full-time college student who is aspiring to become an attorney myself, I thoroughly appreciated his time talking about my aspirations and just how the legal system is supposed to work. I truly recommend this law firm; I have already given multiple recommendations to my fellow friends and family members if they have any kind of personal injury or any other civil case. Unfortunately, this was not my first personal injury case from a car crash, I did not use Mr. Connell for that case but, I wish I did because I communicated more with Mr. Connell and his team than any other law firm that I have encountered around Las Vegas.
Although Mr. Connell is amazing at his job, his paralegal Ms. Rodriguez was just as attentive and caring as Mr. Connell. I talked Ms. Rodriguez’s ear off for questions and directions for the case, she was understanding and thoughtful in addressing my needs. For my medical diagnosis and treatment, I wanted a second opinion, Ms. Rodriguez ran to the rescue and got me a second opinion doctor’s appointment the next day that would also read over my case and address my issues. Thank you, Ms. Rodriguez, for your patience, understanding, and kindness to me.
Words cannot describe my appreciation towards this amazing team, they lifted stress off my shoulders and worked with my school schedule to accommodate me. I look forward to working with this team in the future or referring more individuals to this firm.
